# howtofilebankruptcy.org

> Step-by-step guide to filing bankruptcy -- credit counseling, means test, petition, 341 meeting, discharge.

howtofilebankruptcy.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://howtofilebankruptcy.org/ -- Step-by-step bankruptcy filing guide
- https://howtofilebankruptcy.org/documents-checklist.html -- Documents needed to file
- https://howtofilebankruptcy.org/filing-fees.html -- Court fees, fee waivers, installment plans
- https://howtofilebankruptcy.org/find-your-court.html -- Find your local bankruptcy court

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
